svg.title: DeepLabV3 architecture diagram
svg.desc: DeepLabV3 pipeline: Input Image → ResNet-50 → ASPP (with 5 parallel branches) → Decoder → Segmentation Map.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the ResNet-50 backbone work in DeepLabV3?')
sendPrompt('How does the ASPP module aggregate multi-scale context?')
sendPrompt('What does the decoder do in DeepLabV3?')
sendPrompt('What does the segmentation map output look like?')
sendPrompt('Why is a 1×1 convolution used in ASPP?')
sendPrompt('What receptive field does dilation rate 6 give?')
sendPrompt('What receptive field does dilation rate 12 give?')
sendPrompt('What receptive field does dilation rate 18 give?')
sendPrompt('Why does ASPP include global average pooling?')
sendPrompt('How are the ASPP branches concatenated and projected?')
